text:
낮은 숨으로 시작해
긴 모음을 이어가
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Begin with a low breath
Hold the open vowel
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
ひくいこきゅうではじめよう
ながいぼいんをのばそう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
긴 모음을 이어가
같은 음을 다시 불러
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Hold the open vowel
Sing the same note again
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
ながいぼいんをのばそう
おなじおとをくりかえす
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
같은 음을 다시 불러
천천히 위로 올라가
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Sing the same note again
Move slowly higher now
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
おなじおとをくりかえす
ゆっくりうえへすすもう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
천천히 위로 올라가
부드럽게 아래로 내려와
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Move slowly higher now
Drift gently downward
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
ゆっくりうえへすすもう
やさしくしたへおりよう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
부드럽게 아래로 내려와
멀리 크게 뛰어올라
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Drift gently downward
Leap across the distant sky
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
やさしくしたへおりよう
とおくへおおきくとぼう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
멀리 크게 뛰어올라
짧은 리듬을 반복해
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Leap across the distant sky
Repeat the short rhythm
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
とおくへおおきくとぼう
みじかいりずむをくりかえす
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
짧은 리듬을 반복해
밝은 소리로 노래해
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Repeat the short rhythm
Sing with a brighter tone
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
みじかいりずむをくりかえす
あかるいこえでうたおう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
밝은 소리로 노래해
어두운 빛을 품어
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Sing with a brighter tone
Carry the darker color
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
あかるいこえでうたおう
くらいいろをだいてうたう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
어두운 빛을 품어
바람처럼 가볍게 불러
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Carry the darker color
Float lightly in the wind
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
くらいいろをだいてうたう
かぜのようにかるくうたう
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
바람처럼 가볍게 불러
깊은 밤을 지나가
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Float lightly in the wind
Travel through the deep night
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
かぜのようにかるくうたう
ふかいよるをこえてゆく
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
깊은 밤을 지나가
새로운 아침을 맞아
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
Travel through the deep night
Welcome the waking morning
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
ふかいよるをこえてゆく
あたらしいあさをむかえる
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
새로운 아침을 맞아
낮은 숨으로 시작해
shape: gentle legato, mid register ascending phrase

text:
